issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, focusing only on happy paths.

scenarios.name: create-fifo-topic-with-dedup-and-publish
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies the rubric with complete commands, while Response A is incomplete and does not provide the required commands.

scenarios.name: configure-subscription-filter-policy
scenarios.rationale: Response A directly provides the required SNS set-subscription-attributes command, while Response B describes an EventBridge setup and omits the requested command.
